name: Creamy Spinach and Beef Layered Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 oz uncooked mini lasagna noodles (4 cups)
1 lb Frozen cut leaf spinach, thawed and squeezed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
3. Cook noodles until desired doneness, as directed on package; drain.
4. In a medium skillet, cook ground beef, onion, and garlic over medium-high heat until the beef is browned; drain if needed.
5. Add soup and mushrooms to the skillet; mix well.
6. In a large bowl, combine spinach, 2 cups cottage cheese, and 2 eggs; mix thoroughly.
7. In another large bowl, combine cooked noodles, remaining 1 cup cottage cheese, and remaining egg; toss gently.
8. Layer half of the noodle mixture, spinach and beef mixture in the greased dish.
9. Repeat layering with the remaining ingredients.
10. Cover with foil and bake for 35-40 minutes.
11. Remove from oven and sprinkle fried onions over the top.
12. Return to oven and cook an additional 5 minutes.
13. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
